description: Paired A0/A1/A2 sensitivity for age-weighted expected outdoor-exposure disutility before the fleet screen.
scope_notes: Coefficients are transparent mechanism sensitivity assumptions in utility units per expected outdoor minute, not estimated health valuations.
Fare sensitivity and value of time are unchanged. Weather exposure adds a separate physical-burden term.
The term applies only when departure is inside the configured W1/W2 behavioral weather window; W1 physiological heat dose is still integrated across the full day.
Digital access affects ride-hailing availability only and does not alter biological vulnerability.
A scenario should be selected for behavioral plausibility before testing ride-hailing fleet thresholds.
